findings.evidence: `Finite.lean:111-123` defines `incl := (ComoduleCat.isFG ...).ι` and proves object/map rfl lemmas; Mathlib already has `ObjectProperty.ι_obj` and `ObjectProperty.ι_map` at `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/ObjectProperty/FullSubcategory.lean:61-67`.
findings.fix: Remove these declarations and use `ObjectProperty.ι_obj` / `ObjectProperty.ι_map` for `(ComoduleCat.isFG R C).ι`, or keep only the `incl` abbrev if a named inclusion is needed.
findings.issue: `incl_obj` and `incl_map` restate the generic full-subcategory simp lemmas for `ObjectProperty.ι`.

findings.evidence: `Finite.lean:233-289` defines `FGComoduleCat.isoToLinearEquiv` by `ComoduleCat.isoToLinearEquiv ((incl ...).mapIso i)` and then duplicates toLinearMap/app/refl/symm/trans lemmas already present at `TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean:333-389`.
findings.fix: Reuse the existing `ComoduleCat.isoToLinearEquiv` lemmas on `((incl R C).mapIso i)` and add only a minimal bridge theorem if downstream code cannot rewrite through `incl`.
findings.issue: The `FGComoduleCat.isoToLinearEquiv_*` simp family is a parallel copy of the existing `ComoduleCat.isoToLinearEquiv_*` API after applying the inclusion functor.

summary: The PR adds local full-subcategory and iso-to-linear-equivalence API that substantially duplicates existing Mathlib/TauCeti declarations instead of reusing them.
